question_intent: average lap time for drivers from the UK who have won at least one race, excluding races in the UK

plan.question_intent: average lap time for drivers from the UK who have won at least one race, excluding races in the UK
plan.detail_query: SELECT d.forename, d.surname, r.year, r.name AS race_name, c.country, AVG(l.milliseconds) AS avg_lap_time FROM laptimes AS l JOIN drivers AS d ON l.driverid = d.driverid JOIN races AS r ON l.raceid = r.raceid JOIN circuits AS c ON r.circuitid = c.circuitid JOIN target AS t ON l.driverid = t.driverid AND l.raceid = t.raceid WHERE d.nationality = 'British' AND t.win = 1 AND c.country != 'UK' GROUP BY d.forename, d.surname, r.year, r.name, c.country

blocks.name: leaf_1
blocks.select_clause: SELECT d.driverid, l.raceid, AVG(l.milliseconds) AS avg_lap_time
join_clauses: JOIN drivers AS d ON l.driverid = d.driverid
JOIN races AS r ON l.raceid = r.raceid
JOIN circuits AS c ON r.circuitid = c.circuitid
JOIN target AS t ON l.driverid = t.driverid AND l.raceid = t.raceid
blocks.notes: average lap time for British drivers who have won at least one race, excluding races in the UK

blocks.name: root
blocks.notes: final scalar block for the average lap time

steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM laptimes AS l
LIMIT 5

steps.clause: JOIN drivers AS d ON l.driverid = d.driverid
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM laptimes AS l
JOIN drivers AS d ON l.driverid = d.driverid
LIMIT 5

steps.clause: JOIN races AS r ON l.raceid = r.raceid
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM laptimes AS l
JOIN drivers AS d ON l.driverid = d.driverid
JOIN races AS r ON l.raceid = r.raceid
LIMIT 5

steps.clause: JOIN circuits AS c ON r.circuitid = c.circuitid
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM laptimes AS l
JOIN drivers AS d ON l.driverid = d.driverid
JOIN races AS r ON l.raceid = r.raceid
JOIN circuits AS c ON r.circuitid = c.circuitid
LIMIT 5

steps.clause: JOIN target AS t ON l.driverid = t.driverid AND l.raceid = t.raceid
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM laptimes AS l
JOIN drivers AS d ON l.driverid = d.driverid
JOIN races AS r ON l.raceid = r.raceid
JOIN circuits AS c ON r.circuitid = c.circuitid
JOIN target AS t ON l.driverid = t.driverid AND l.raceid = t.raceid
LIMIT 5

SELECT *
FROM laptimes AS l
JOIN drivers AS d ON l.driverid = d.driverid
JOIN races AS r ON l.raceid = r.raceid
JOIN circuits AS c ON r.circuitid = c.circuitid
JOIN target AS t ON l.driverid = t.driverid AND l.raceid = t.raceid
WHERE (d.nationality = 'British')
LIMIT 5

FROM laptimes AS l
JOIN drivers AS d ON l.driverid = d.driverid
JOIN races AS r ON l.raceid = r.raceid
JOIN circuits AS c ON r.circuitid = c.circuitid
JOIN target AS t ON l.driverid = t.driverid AND l.raceid = t.raceid
WHERE (d.nationality = 'British' OR d.nationality = 'British' IS NULL)
LIMIT 5

steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM laptimes AS l
JOIN drivers AS d ON l.driverid = d.driverid
JOIN races AS r ON l.raceid = r.raceid
JOIN circuits AS c ON r.circuitid = c.circuitid
JOIN target AS t ON l.driverid = t.driverid AND l.raceid = t.raceid
WHERE (c.country != 'UK')
LIMIT 5

SELECT d.driverid, l.raceid, AVG(l.milliseconds) AS avg_lap_time
FROM laptimes AS l
JOIN drivers AS d ON l.driverid = d.driverid
JOIN races AS r ON l.raceid = r.raceid
JOIN circuits AS c ON r.circuitid = c.circuitid
JOIN target AS t ON l.driverid = t.driverid AND l.raceid = t.raceid
WHERE (c.country != 'UK')
GROUP BY d.driverid, l.raceid

build_logs.notes: final scalar block for the average lap time

steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM (SELECT d.driverid, l.raceid, AVG(l.milliseconds) AS avg_lap_time
FROM laptimes AS l
JOIN drivers AS d ON l.driverid = d.driverid
JOIN races AS r ON l.raceid = r.raceid
JOIN circuits AS c ON r.circuitid = c.circuitid
JOIN target AS t ON l.driverid = t.driverid AND l.raceid = t.raceid
WHERE (c.country != 'UK')
GROUP BY d.driverid, l.raceid) AS leaf_1
LIMIT 5

SELECT AVG(leaf_1.avg_lap_time)
FROM (SELECT d.driverid, l.raceid, AVG(l.milliseconds) AS avg_lap_time
FROM laptimes AS l
JOIN drivers AS d ON l.driverid = d.driverid
JOIN races AS r ON l.raceid = r.raceid
JOIN circuits AS c ON r.circuitid = c.circuitid
JOIN target AS t ON l.driverid = t.driverid AND l.raceid = t.raceid
WHERE (c.country != 'UK')
GROUP BY d.driverid, l.raceid) AS leaf_1

nearest.sql:
SELECT AVG(leaf_1.points) AS avg_points
FROM (SELECT d.driverid, r.raceid, res.points
FROM results AS res
JOIN drivers AS d ON res.driverid = d.driverid
JOIN races AS r ON res.raceid = r.raceid
JOIN circuits AS c ON r.circuitid = c.circuitid
WHERE ((c.country = 'Australia'))
GROUP BY d.driverid, r.raceid, res.points) AS leaf_1

SELECT AVG(points) AS average_points
FROM (SELECT d.driverid, r.raceid, cs.points
FROM drivers d
JOIN results r ON d.driverid = r.driverid
JOIN constructorstandings cs ON r.constructorid = cs.constructorid
WHERE (d.nationality IN ('Australian', 'British'))) AS leaf_1

question: What is the average of the average lap times per driver per race, excluding races held in the UK?
